# Numinia Digital Goods
> An open registry of CC0-licensed digital assets for games, VR, and the metaverse.

## About
Numinia Digital Goods is a platform by Numen Games for discovering, downloading, and managing free digital assets. All curated assets are CC0 (public domain). The platform follows a "File Over App" philosophy — data lives in open files, not databases.

## Asset Types
- 3D Models (GLB) — props, environments, objects
- Avatars (VRM) — VR-ready humanoid characters
- Hyperfy Worlds (HYP) — interactive 3D apps
- 3D Print (STL) — physical fabrication files
- Audio (MP3, OGG) — soundscapes, music
- Video (MP4, WebM) — cinematics, demos
- Images (JPG, PNG, WebP) — textures, references

## API
GET https://numinia.store/api/assets — All public assets (JSON)
GET https://numinia.store/api/assets?search=avatar — Search by name
GET https://numinia.store/api/collections — All collections

## Data Repository
https://github.com/PabloFMM/numinia-digital-goods-data
All metadata is stored as JSON. Binaries on Cloudflare R2 CDN + GitHub.

## License
Code: MIT. Assets: CC0 (no attribution required).
